items.title: Have several Pacers stories up on the site, some from last weeks' draft workouts. Here's one on former walk-on Sam Hoiberg and how -- like many vertically challenged guards who play pressure defense -- he was inspired by T.J. McConnell: www.indystar.com/story/sports...
items.author: Dustin Dopirak
items.body_excerpt: Have several Pacers stories up on the site, some from last weeks' draft workouts. Here's one on former walk-on Sam Hoiberg and how -- like many vertically challenged guards who play pressure defense -- he was inspired by T.J. McConnell: www.indystar.com/story/sports...

media.title: Sam Hoiberg drew inspiration from T.J. McConnell: 'I can do some of those things'
media.description: Nebraska's undersized guard Sam Hoiberg emulated T.J. McConnell's game, helped Nebraska get to the tournament and earned NBA looks.

items.title: T.J. McConnell's rare start makes huge difference for Philadelphia 76ers
items.author: NBA.com
